verses.quran_arabic: بِّسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ
verses.text: Surely We sent it down on the Night of the Decree.
And what will make you know what the Night of the Decree is?

verses.quran_arabic: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍۢ
verses.text: The Night of the Decree is better than a thousand months.

verses.quran_arabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍۢ
verses.text: The angels and the spirit come down during it, by the permission of their Lord, on account of every command.
It is (a night of) peace, until the rising of the dawn.
